title: Enhanced Foxes
description: This resource pack updates the fox model and texture, giving them a fresher look.
body:
![Sleep fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d9f6fcc8ea4a70bf148dcf1769189d6ef69959.jpeg)
### What does this resource pack do?
This resource pack updates the fox model and texture, giving them a fresher look.

### Requirements
This resource pack requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

[Fresh Animations Add-On](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-foxes-x-fresh-animations)
